draft_doc.markdown:
# Services Agreement Review Draft

Draft ref: runx:contract-draft:c29a7681049d5b7e
Template: public-services-review-v1
Template source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RYDE-PLAY/frantic-86-contract-drafter/5ef65cde926e0aa5aad88fb966518ff7f877117c/public/template.json
Status: review draft; not legally approved; not sent.

## Parties and Effective Date

Northstar Example Services LLC and Harbor Example Studio Inc. enter this agreement effective 2026-07-15.

## Services

Northstar Example Services LLC will provide Monthly release engineering review and incident-readiness support.

## Fees and Payment

Harbor Example Studio Inc. will pay USD 8,000 per month under Net 45 payment terms.

## Limitation of Liability

The aggregate liability cap is USD 80,000 aggregate.

## Confidentiality

Confidentiality obligations survive for 2 years.

## Governing Law

The agreement is governed by Delaware.

## Deviations from template baseline

- confidentiality (confidentiality_period): baseline 3 years; proposed 2 years.
- governing-law (governing_law): baseline California; proposed Delaware.
- liability (liability_cap): baseline Fees paid in the prior 12 months; proposed USD 80,000 aggregate.
- fees (payment_terms): baseline Net 30; proposed Net 45.
